# StageSet Controller

> StageSet is a Flux-compatible Kubernetes controller for ordered, gated, multi-stage delivery. A `StageSet` (apiVersion `stages.metio.wtf/v1`) rolls out a sequence of stages — each built from a Flux `ExternalArtifact` — waiting for each stage to become healthy before the next, with typed pre/post/onFailure actions (patch/http/wait/job/delete/apply), update windows, versioned migrations, conflict policies, ready checks, and per-stage ApplySet pruning. It is continuously reconciled, drift-corrected, and applies under per-tenant ServiceAccount impersonation.

Only `spec.stages` is required; `spec.interval` is optional (defaults to the controller's `--default-interval`). The chart is the only supported install. Project home: https://stageset.projects.metio.wtf/ — source: https://github.com/metio/stageset-controller — full text for LLMs: https://stageset.projects.metio.wtf/llms-full.txt

## Installation

- [Kubernetes](https://stageset.projects.metio.wtf/installation/kubernetes/): prerequisites (Flux ≥ v2.7.0 with ExternalArtifact) and the Helm install
- [Production](https://stageset.projects.metio.wtf/installation/production/): HA, hardening (each option as Helm values), the settings you tune, on-prem + EKS reference setups, and the controller-flags reference
- [Operations](https://stageset.projects.metio.wtf/installation/operations/): metrics, the opt-in PrometheusRule alerts, events, runbooks, drift correction

## Tutorials

- [From Jsonnet to a gated rollout](https://stageset.projects.metio.wtf/tutorials/jsonnet-to-rollout/): write Jsonnet → JaaS renders an ExternalArtifact → StageSet rolls it out
- [Publishing manifests as a Flux source](https://stageset.projects.metio.wtf/tutorials/flux-sources/): Git, OCI, Bucket, and inline sources feeding JaaS
- [Parameterizing a rollout](https://stageset.projects.metio.wtf/tutorials/parameters/): JaaS TLAs/extVars at render time, StageSet postBuild substitution at delivery
- [Progressive delivery with Flagger](https://stageset.projects.metio.wtf/tutorials/progressive-delivery/): the stage gate endpoint for Flagger, and the readiness gauge / JSON gate for Argo Rollouts

## Usage (one feature each)

- [Stages and sources](https://stageset.projects.metio.wtf/usage/stages-and-sources/): ordered stages, sourceRef, path, prune, patches, postBuild
- [Actions](https://stageset.projects.metio.wtf/usage/actions/): typed pre/post/onFailure steps — job, http, wait, patch, delete, apply
- [Ready checks](https://stageset.projects.metio.wtf/usage/ready-checks/): kstatus + CEL gating of stage completion
- [Conflict policies](https://stageset.projects.metio.wtf/usage/conflict-policies/): Fail/Recreate/KeepExisting, per-resource rules, allowDataLoss
- [Update windows](https://stageset.projects.metio.wtf/usage/update-windows/): Allow/Deny on a schedule, windowScope, update-now
- [Versioned migrations](https://stageset.projects.metio.wtf/usage/versioned-migrations/): run migrations once when crossing a version boundary
- [Rollback](https://stageset.projects.metio.wtf/usage/rollback/): rollbackOnFailure + the PVC/S3 rollback store
- [Multi-cluster and tenancy](https://stageset.projects.metio.wtf/usage/multi-cluster/): impersonation, scoped ServiceAccounts, remote clusters
- [Producer-aware sources](https://stageset.projects.metio.wtf/usage/producer-aware-sources/): reference a producer (e.g. a JaaS JsonnetSnippet) and let StageSet find its artifact

## API reference

- [StageSet](https://stageset.projects.metio.wtf/api/stageset/): every spec/status field, each shown in YAML
- [StageInventory](https://stageset.projects.metio.wtf/api/stageinventory/): the controller-managed prune inventory (read-only)

## CLI (stagesetctl)

- [Overview](https://stageset.projects.metio.wtf/cli/): global flags, exit codes
- [get](https://stageset.projects.metio.wtf/cli/get/) · [build](https://stageset.projects.metio.wtf/cli/build/) · [diff](https://stageset.projects.metio.wtf/cli/diff/) · [reconcile](https://stageset.projects.metio.wtf/cli/reconcile/)

## Comparisons

- [vs Helm](https://stageset.projects.metio.wtf/comparisons/helm/) · [vs Kustomize](https://stageset.projects.metio.wtf/comparisons/kustomize/) · [vs Flux kustomize-controller](https://stageset.projects.metio.wtf/comparisons/flux/) · [vs Tanka & kubecfg](https://stageset.projects.metio.wtf/comparisons/tanka-kubecfg/) · [vs Argo Rollouts](https://stageset.projects.metio.wtf/comparisons/argo-rollouts/)

## Operations

- [Runbooks](https://stageset.projects.metio.wtf/runbooks/): one page per Ready-condition reason plus cross-cutting incident guides
- [Contributing](https://stageset.projects.metio.wtf/contributing/): building/testing, CI, releases, and the DCO sign-off
